name: file_event_win_pfx_file_creation
raw_query: any where file.path:"*.pfx" and (not (((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\OneDrive.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft OneDrive\\OneDrive.exe")) and file.path:"*\\OneDrive\\CodeSigning.pfx") or (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*")) or file.path:"C:\\Program Files\\CMake\\*"))
